case_title: BLU JASON VASS BRYAN VS. DIESEL USA. INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DIESEL USA. INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY VASS BRAYN, BLU JASON AS TO DEFENDANT DIESEL USA. INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASS BRAYN, BLU JASON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF BLU JASON VASS BRYAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIESEL USA, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CLINTON BISNAR, STORE MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASS BRAYN, BLU JASON AS TO DEFENDANT DIESEL USA. INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASS BRAYN, BLU JASON IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIESEL USA. INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-07-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIESEL USA. INC.
